general.name: SDC-Temp
general.description: To be scoped out exclusively to Saks.com users & endpoints only.
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>32C077A7-15A0-4318-9D6C-FC734BEC0088</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>32C077A7-15A0-4318-9D6C-FC734BEC0088</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>SDC-Temp</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>To be scoped out exclusively to Saks.com users & endpoints only. </string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>DA846772-C06C-4AEC-924A-1A87036E23AC</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.wifi.managed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>DA846772-C06C-4AEC-924A-1A87036E23AC</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>WiFi (sdc-temp)</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>HIDDEN_NETWORK</key><false/><key>Password</key><string>5@ks0rNowh3re!</string><key>EncryptionType</key><string>WPA2</string><key>AutoJoin</key><false/><key>CaptiveBypass</key><false/><key>ProxyType</key><string>None</string><key>SetupModes</key><array/><key>SSID_STR</key><string>sdc-temp</string><key>Interface</key><string>BuiltInWireless</string></dict></array></dict></plist>
